content:
There seems to be a bug with Vortice pursuit. When starting battle, pursuit damage is normal. However, after retrying the battle or doing turn rewind, the pursuit damage is reduced. 

I have attached a video. I started the battle and exalted, pursuit damage is ~16k. After retrying the turn, pursuit damage is now ~3k. This bug happens when retrying the battle (on death or manually) or on turn rewind.
💭「Processing」Vortice Pursuit damage bug on battle/turn retry
